title: Kinetics of Polymerisation of Tungstic Acid and the Effect of Ethanol on the Process
author: B. N. Ghosh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The polymerisation of tungstic acid molecules in aqueous medium, prepared by ion-exchange method, is a condensation polymerisation reaction of the third order. 

 There is retardation of turbidity with the increase of molecular ratio of ethanol to water. A quantitative explanation has been attempted on the basis of formation of a complex between tungstic acid and ethanol.
steps_raw:
